name: hb_2_23
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-18 for Chang'an, Qiaoxi and Gaoyi (all Shijiazhuang districts) compute and store: mean_aqi_changan, mean_aqi_qiaoxi, mean_aqi_gaoyi (float), urban_to_rural_diff (mean of the two urban districts minus Gaoyi, float).

turns.query: Assess pollution transmission from urban districts (Chang'an, Qiaoxi) to rural Gaoyi County on 2025-06-18
